events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1120. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: fish, gluten. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 45–65 g/meal. Prefers American; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: stovetop. 10 meals/week, zone Visitacion Valley.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 45–65 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/800 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–65) ✓, no fish/gluten ✓.

events.title: Matched: Three-Bean Veggie Chili
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 480/800 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 45–65) ✓, no fish/gluten ✓.

events.title: Matched: BBQ Chicken with Corn and Slaw
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 575/800 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–65) ✓, no fish/gluten ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1120 added to route R-VISI-1 (Visitacion Valley), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1120: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
